knowledge_atoms.text: Come and see my new pen pal. His name is John, too!
Do the four people in the text want pen pals?
knowledge_atoms.gloss: 课文中的四个人想要笔友吗？

knowledge_atoms.text: Do you want to learn about robots?
Does Oliver do word puzzles every day?
knowledge_atoms.gloss: 奥利弗每天都猜字谜吗？

knowledge_atoms.text: Does he like doing word puzzles and going hiking?
knowledge_atoms.gloss: 他喜欢猜字谜和去远足吗？

knowledge_atoms.text: Does he live in China, too?
Does he live on the South Island?
He likes doing kung fu and swimming.
He likes flying kites and singing English songs.
He likes reading stories. He lives on a farm, so sometimes he reads to the cows!
He likes singing and dancing very much.
knowledge_atoms.gloss: 他非常喜欢唱歌和跳舞。

knowledge_atoms.text: He lives in Australia, but he studies Chinese.
knowledge_atoms.gloss: 他住在澳大利亚，但他学中文。

knowledge_atoms.text: Hey, Binbin. What are you doing?
Hey, Zhang Peng, what are your hobbies?
knowledge_atoms.gloss: 嘿，张鹏，你的爱好是什么？

knowledge_atoms.text: How many hobbies can you find in the text?
knowledge_atoms.gloss: 你在课文中能找到多少种爱好？

knowledge_atoms.text: I also like singing and doing kung fu.
knowledge_atoms.gloss: 我也喜欢唱歌和练功夫。
我对澳大利亚非常感兴趣。
加入我们的足球俱乐部！

knowledge_atoms.text: My best friend is Xu Wei.
No, he doesn't. He lives in Australia, but he studies Chinese.
No, he doesn't. He lives in Canberra.
knowledge_atoms.gloss: 不，他不是。他住在堪培拉。

knowledge_atoms.text: Oliver, this is my pen pal Peter. He's from New Zealand.
Really? Does he live in China, too?
The Monkey King likes reading books.

knowledge_atoms.gloss: 动词第三人称单数形式

knowledge_atoms.text: What a great story! Is it true?
What do the two Johns like?
Yes, he does. He lives on a farm. Look!
Zac liked his new tail, and so did all the other squirrels.
knowledge_atoms.gloss: 扎克喜欢他的新尾巴，其他所有的松鼠也喜欢。

knowledge_atoms.text: Zhang Peng is talking with Oliver about his pen pal. Listen and then write T (true) or F (false).

page_lessons.page_intro_cn: Theme: I have a pen pal. This is the introductory scene for Unit 4. Inside a treehouse, Zip the squirrel and Zoom the bear are talking about their food and drink preferences.
entry_probe_questions: Do you know the word tea?
Can you say: What do you like?

page_lessons.page_intro_cn: Theme: I have a pen pal. Wu Binbin is introducing his pen pal Peter to Oliver. They are looking at photos and a computer screen showing a farm.
entry_probe_questions: Do you know the word pen pal?
Can you say: What are his hobbies?

page_lessons.page_intro_cn: Theme: I have a pen pal. Oliver and Zhang Peng are talking about Peter's hobbies. The illustration shows a boy reading to cows on a farm.
entry_probe_questions: Do you know the word hobby?
Can you say: What are Peter's hobbies?

page_lessons.page_intro_cn: Theme: I have a pen pal. Peter and Zhang Peng are discussing hobbies via video chat.
entry_probe_questions: Do you know the word dancing?
Can you say: Hey, Zhang Peng, what are your hobbies?

page_lessons.page_intro_cn: Theme: I have a pen pal. John and Wu Binbin are talking about Wu Binbin's new pen pal in Australia.
entry_probe_questions: Do you know the word pen pal?
Can you say: Does he live in Sydney?

page_lessons.page_intro_cn: Theme: I have a pen pal. John introduces his new pen pal to his brother. The section presents phrases about hobbies.
entry_probe_questions: Do you know the word cooks Chinese food?
Can you say: Does he live in China, too?

page_lessons.page_intro_cn: Theme: I have a pen pal. A notice board displaying four different club advertisements.
entry_probe_questions: Do you know the word notice board?
Can you say: Shall we dance?

page_lessons.page_intro_cn: Theme: I have a pen pal. An advertisement for a cooking club titled 'Let's cook!'. Students need to choose the correct verb forms.
entry_probe_questions: Do you know the word cooking club?
Can you say: Third person singular verbs

page_lessons.page_intro_cn: Theme: I have a pen pal. Grammar practice: Read the text about Jane, underline verbs, and write their base forms.
entry_probe_questions: Do you know the word studies?
Can you say: Third person singular verb forms

page_lessons.page_intro_cn: Theme: I have a pen pal. A story about a squirrel named Zac and the Monkey King, explaining why squirrels have bushy tails.
entry_probe_questions: Do you know the word squirrel?
Can you say: He likes singing and dancing very much.

teaching_blocks.teaching_goal: Understand and say the core dialogue pattern on the page.
teaching_blocks.teaching_summary: This is the introductory scene for Unit 4. Inside a treehouse, Zip the squirrel and Zoom the bear are talking about their food and drink preferences. Key patterns: What do you like?; I don't have any cake.
allowed_answer_scope: Sorry, I don't have any cake.
entry_probe_questions: Do you know the word tea?
Can you say: What do you like?

teaching_blocks.teaching_goal: Understand and say the core dialogue pattern on the page.
teaching_blocks.teaching_summary: Wu Binbin is introducing his pen pal Peter to Oliver. They are looking at photos and a computer screen showing a farm. Key patterns: What are his hobbies?; He likes doing kung fu and swimming.
core_patterns: He likes doing kung fu and swimming.
Does he live on the South Island?
Oliver, this is my pen pal Peter. He's from New Zealand.
Yes, he does. He lives on a farm. Look!
allowed_answer_scope: Oliver, this is my pen pal Peter. He's from New Zealand.
He likes doing kung fu and swimming.
Yes, he does. He lives on a farm. Look!
entry_probe_questions: Do you know the word pen pal?
Can you say: What are his hobbies?
return_anchors: He likes doing kung fu and swimming.
Does he live on the South Island?

teaching_blocks.teaching_goal: Catch the key information from the listening task.
teaching_blocks.teaching_summary: Zhang Peng is talking with Oliver about his pen pal. Key patterns: Zhang Peng is talking with Oliver about his pen pal. Listen and then write T (true) or F (false).
core_patterns: Zhang Peng is talking with Oliver about his pen pal. Listen and then write T (true) or F (false).
entry_probe_questions: Do you know the word pen pal?
Can you say: Zhang Peng is talking with Oliver about his pen pal. Listen and then write T (true) or F (false).
return_anchors: Zhang Peng is talking with Oliver about his pen pal. Listen and then write T (true) or F (false).

teaching_blocks.teaching_goal: Understand and say the core dialogue pattern on the page.
teaching_blocks.teaching_summary: Oliver and Zhang Peng are talking about Peter's hobbies. The illustration shows a boy reading to cows on a farm. Key patterns: What are Peter's hobbies?; He likes reading stories.
core_patterns: He likes doing kung fu and swimming.
He likes reading stories. He lives on a farm, so sometimes he reads to the cows!
allowed_answer_scope: He likes reading stories. He lives on a farm, so sometimes he reads to the cows!
He likes doing kung fu and swimming.
Yes. I'm going to teach him the Chinese song "Jasmine Flower"!
entry_probe_questions: Do you know the word hobby?
Can you say: What are Peter's hobbies?
return_anchors: He likes doing kung fu and swimming.

teaching_blocks.teaching_goal: Use the page dialogue pattern in short guided practice.
teaching_blocks.teaching_summary: Students practice asking and answering about their best friend's hobbies. Key patterns: Who is your best friend?; What are his/her hobbies?
core_patterns: My best friend is Xu Wei.
He likes flying kites and singing English songs.
allowed_answer_scope: My best friend is Xu Wei.
He likes flying kites and singing English songs.
entry_probe_questions: Do you know the word playing sports?
Can you say: Who is your best friend?

teaching_blocks.teaching_goal: Recognize and say the core vocabulary on the page.
teaching_blocks.teaching_summary: Peter and Zhang Peng are discussing hobbies via video chat. Key patterns: Hey, Zhang Peng, what are your hobbies?; I like reading stories.
core_patterns: Hey, Zhang Peng, what are your hobbies?
I also like singing and doing kung fu.
entry_probe_questions: Do you know the word dancing?
Can you say: Hey, Zhang Peng, what are your hobbies?
return_anchors: Hey, Zhang Peng, what are your hobbies?
I also like singing and doing kung fu.

teaching_blocks.teaching_goal: Transfer the page language into a new speaking task.
teaching_blocks.teaching_summary: Students interview classmates about hobbies, fill out a survey table, and report the results. Key patterns: What are your hobbies?; I like singing and dancing.
entry_probe_questions: Can you say: What are your hobbies?

teaching_blocks.teaching_goal: Catch the key information from the listening task.
teaching_blocks.teaching_summary: School is over. Miss White is talking to Wu Binbin. Listen and circle. Key patterns: Listen and circle.
entry_probe_questions: Do you know the word pen pal?
Can you say: Listen and circle.

teaching_blocks.teaching_goal: Understand and say the core dialogue pattern on the page.
teaching_blocks.teaching_summary: John and Wu Binbin are talking about Wu Binbin's new pen pal in Australia. Key patterns: Does he live in Sydney?; No, he doesn't. He lives in Canberra.
core_patterns: No, he doesn't. He lives in Canberra.
Does he like doing word puzzles and going hiking?
What do the two Johns like?
Hey, Binbin. What are you doing?
allowed_answer_scope: I'm writing an email to my new pen pal in Australia.
No, he doesn't. He lives in Canberra. His name is John, too.
entry_probe_questions: Do you know the word pen pal?
Can you say: Does he live in Sydney?
return_anchors: No, he doesn't. He lives in Canberra.
Does he like doing word puzzles and going hiking?

teaching_blocks.teaching_goal: Work on the writing prompt activity.
teaching_blocks.teaching_summary: A writing task to fill in a message to John in Australia about hobbies and favorites. Key patterns: I'm very interested in Australia.; I'm learning English.
entry_probe_questions: Do you know the word hobbies?
Can you say: I'm very interested in Australia.

teaching_blocks.teaching_goal: Recognize and say the core vocabulary on the page.

core_patterns: Does he live in China, too?
He lives in Australia, but he studies Chinese.

return_anchors: Does he live in China, too?

teaching_blocks.teaching_goal: Work on the practice speaking activity.

teaching_blocks.teaching_goal: Work on the writing prompt activity.
teaching_blocks.teaching_summary: A table for students to list their own hobbies and their partner's hobbies. Key patterns: What is your hobby?

Can you say: What is your hobby?

teaching_blocks.teaching_summary: Comprehension questions based on the previous reading text about pen pals and hobbies. Key patterns: Do the four people in the text want pen pals?; How many hobbies can you find in the text?

The Monkey King likes reading books.
Zac liked his new tail, and so did all the other squirrels.
What a great story! Is it true?
